item.title: 3 Ways To Install PUB G Mobile Korea In Android |
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-xFeRZsSG7gw/X1Sgh-rUvlI/AAAAAAAABmE/mJbcUCKuRzgHjPDlGmcSu5VDUnSzPV5oQCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1599381583140876-0.png" alt=""> Few days back pub g mobile and lite versions banned in India due to the game violiates indian integrity and sovierity and main reason was to stop chinese product usage and grow self reliantly through aatma nirbhaar scheme. Well, India have problem with china not south korea right so if you are big fan of pub g and stressed out due to the ban you can’t play the game.
